feat.name: Misty Transformation
feat.text: Wild mists cover your form. You create a hazy cloud in a 5-foot burst centered on one corner of your space. If your new form is Large or larger, the cloud covers your entire space instead. All creatures within the area are concealed, and all others are concealed to them. The cloud lasts until the beginning of your next turn but is immediately dispersed by a strong wind.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.

feat.trigger: You transform due to a polymorph effect.
